Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Peter S. Hwu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff IMP Foods, Inc.
Glenn Sakata, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Toraya, LLC or Franklin Takao.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 19, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 19, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff IMP Foods, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants, IMP Foods, Inc., and Franklin Takao as follows:

Damages/Principal - $78,568.45.
Prejudgment Interest - $16,725.39.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $400.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $96,693.84.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
